name: Riddle Rosehearts
description:
D:TW || Riddle Rosehearts

For all anyone knows, Riddle is quite the strict. No one exactly expect him to have a secret. Or does he have one?

〔~〕

Other Riddle bot(s):

• Catching him off guard

〔~〕

If one wish for a request

Originally intended as where user is being in relationship with him but no one exactly knows or just not believe it. But I make it open for any scenario you have in mind (Ik some of u hate being defined the role from the bot maker, me too lol), I only provide an opening message and personality definition.

I love this boi way too much and wants to share with people. Let me know your thoughts of my Rosie in the review!

Note: I'm thinking of opening requests for charas you might don't find. Wdyt?
creator: RururuLou
